narrowIdea: The live workflow in four concrete steps.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Pick the task
steps.subtitle: One CLI, one clear outcome
steps.description: Start from one narrow business task with a visible finish line. Small scope gives faster prompts, faster review, and faster confidence.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Write the spec
steps.subtitle: Rules, constraints, acceptance
steps.description: We define constraints, expected output, and the done condition before any code. Spec first removes guesswork from the model.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Build fast
steps.subtitle: Prompt, inspect, patch
steps.description: Generate one slice, inspect the output, then patch the next prompt. Short loops beat big rewrites every time.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Verify and ship
steps.subtitle: Test, demo, publish
steps.description: Run checks, review the preview, and publish only after the result is visible and stable. Verification closes the loop.

notes: This is the inserted step-system slide the deck was missing. Walk it once, then continue into the recap slide.
